meaning: Wired Equivalent Privacy,有线对等加密
examples: o Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n with WPA, WPA2, WEP, 802.1X authentication(1)
It is intended to configure WEP keys according to the networks found.
For security, Airport Extreme employs 128-bit WEP encryption and comes with its own firewall.
Only use WEP if you desperately need the Internet and have no other option.
